# @cascivo/charts

> Chart components built from scratch — scales, shapes, and signal-driven rendering, zero dependencies

[cascivo.com](https://cascivo.com) · [Docs](https://docs.cascivo.com) · [Storybook](https://storybook.cascivo.com) · [GitHub](https://github.com/urbanisierung/cascivo)

Accessible, signal-driven chart library for cascade — AreaChart, BarChart, LineChart, Sparkline, Heatmap, and more. All charts are keyboard-navigable with `aria-live` tooltips. CVD-safe palettes (Okabe-Ito, oklch) verified in CI across all ten themes.

## Install

```sh
pnpm add @cascivo/charts
```
